items.title: Pump.fun is shifting Solana memecoin trading toward stablecoin-based liquidity
items.whyYouShouldCare: The shift to stablecoin-based liquidity in Solana memecoin trading could enhance market stability and attract more participants to the ecosystem.

items.title: Solana: Why the $88–$89 cluster is a short-term line of defense for SOL bears
items.whyYouShouldCare: The $88–$89 price range serves as a critical support level for SOL, indicating potential resistance for bearish market movements.

items.title: World Liberty Financial rebound gives dormant WLFI holders an exit as AI Financial warns of survival risk
items.whyYouShouldCare: The rebound of World Liberty Financial offers dormant WLFI holders a chance to liquidate, highlighting liquidity dynamics in the broader Solana ecosystem.
